title: Sequoia Deprecated
description: Sequoia (sequoia-mod) is a Quality of Life (QoL) mod designed specifically for Wynncraft players, with added features for SEQ guild members.
body:
## Sequoia (sequoia-mod)
**Sequoia (sequoia-mod)** is a **Quality of Life (QoL)** mod designed specifically for **Wynncraft** players. The mod is built for **Fabric & NeoForge 1.21.4** and is fully compatible with Wynntils. Sequoia is free for anyone to use, but Sequoia guild members can enjoy exclusive features to enhance their gameplay experience!

### Features:
- A centralized GUI for managing all mod features.
- The main command is ```/seq``` and here are some useful sub-commands:
  - ```/seq config``` - Opens the configuration GUI.
  - ```/seq onlinemembers``` - Lists the online members of any 
  - ```/seq lastseen``` - Checks when a player was last online.
  - ```/seq playerguild``` - Shows the guild of a player.
  - ```/seq playerraids``` - Displays the raids completed by a player.
  - ```/seq playerdungeons``` - Displays the dungeons completed by a player.
- Guild Message Filter: Filters out specified guild messages from the chat.
- Player Ignore: Ignore players in the shouts, guild chat and party chat.
- Sequoia OST: Plays the [Sequoia OST](https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLOoc3mPzqBIakmoLvgFeS1MOcUmFHDzOi&si=m3bhKsAncP49MPZQ) in game (Composed by OwORawr).
- Discord Chat Bridge (SEQ member exclusive): Bridges the in-game chat with the Discord server.
- Guild Raid Tracker (SEQ member exclusive): Reports completed guild raids to the Discord server.

### Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils)
- [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

### Showcase
